response.justification: Bogdan has a long and technically diverse career spanning 15+ years, with genuine depth in high-throughput distributed systems and full-stack engineering across multiple languages. However, the Principal Software Engineer — Growth / Experimentation Systems role demands a very specific combination of skills — A/B testing platforms, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, experiment assignment systems, statistical analysis, and growth measurement — none of which appear in this resume. There is no mention of experimentation frameworks, rollout automation, bias detection, or metrics pipelines at any point in his career. The role is also scoped at IC6/Principal level, and while Bogdan holds Staff titles, the resume does not demonstrate the cross-organizational architectural ownership or multi-team systemic impact that level requires.
strengths: 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across distributed systems, mobile, embedded, and web — including high-throughput work handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby
Polyglot engineer with demonstrated production use of C, C++, Java, TypeScript/JavaScript, and D, aligning with several required languages
Staff-level IC roles with evidence of technical leadership, developer tooling, and open-source project ownership
concerns: Zero experimentation platform experience — no mention of A/B testing, feature flagging, experiment assignment, rollout automation, or statistical analysis at any employer
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or growth engineering background anywhere in the resume; data aptitude and measurement systems are a core requirement
Seniority and scope gap: the role requires IC6-level cross-organizational architectural ownership and multi-team initiative leadership, which the resume does not demonstrate

key_factors.factor: No experimentation or growth domain experience
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure background
